# Locally-consistent phrases {#sec-phrases}

TBA

- spectrum of anchor selection methods
- tradeoff between regularity of the distance distribution and context dependence / conservation
- least context-dependent: hashed-based criteria independent of the context (e.g. PFP)
- most regular distribution: sample every *k* position, but no conservation at all
- middleground: minimizer-like, sample in a window
